q2.title: Q2. Name(s) of Infrastructure
q2.subtitle: Please provide the name of the infrastructure if present ex: The Mirage, Westlands Primary

q5.title: Q5. Debris
q5.subtitle: Is there any debris that requires clearing on or near the infrastructure site?
q5.yes: YES, there is debris in need of clearing
q5.no: NO, there is no debris in need of clearing

q6.title: Q6. Disaster Location
q6.subtitle: Drag the map to position the pin at the affected location

commercial.label: Commercial Infrastructure
commercial.desc: Markets, malls, shops, hotels, banks, industries, etc.

government.label: Government Building
government.desc: Administrative buildings, courthouses, police stations, fire stations, etc.

utility.label: Utility Infrastructure
utility.desc: Water pumps, power plants, waste treatment plants, etc.

transport.label: Transport and Communication Infrastructure
transport.desc: Roads, cell towers, bridges, railway station, bus station, etc.

community.label: Community Infrastructure
community.desc: Schools, hospitals, community halls, public toilets, etc.

minimal.label: Minimal / No damage
minimal.desc: Structurally sound and functional, showing only cosmetic or no visible damage

partial.label: Partially damaged
partial.desc: Repairable, and remains usable with caution
